title: lithocarpus dasystachyus
intro: Lithocarpus dasystachyus, also known as the Bur Oak Chinkapin, is a deciduous tree native to California and the Pacific Northwest in North America, belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Lithocarpus dasystachyus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Lithocarpus dasystachyus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
